default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review organic growth performance and align on new content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Organic growth is strong:** February was the strongest month since the partnership began, with organic search traffic up 600% and keywords up 500% in six months.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Attribution is the next frontier:** The top priority is attributing specific content to conversions (demos, trials) to focus efforts on high-ROI topics.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**New initiatives are launching:** A "Switching to Siit" migration page and competitor comparison pages are planned to support sales enablement.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [**Content quality is improving:** New features like customer testimonials and "last updated" dates are being implemented to build trust and improve user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

## Topics

### Organic Performance & Attribution Gap

  - [**Strong February Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Organic search traffic: +600% in 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Organic keywords: +500% in 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Returning visitors: +38% in the last 90 days.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [**Content-Led Inbound:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [High-value leads (e.g., Resolve.ai) are booking demos, with organic content suspected as a key driver.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [A recent Discord alternatives article generated 4.5k sessions at 62% engagement, demonstrating the value of a broad content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Attribution Gap:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [The main challenge is linking specific content to conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will use the Claude-HubSpot connector to analyze trial/demo bookings and identify common content themes.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)

### New Content Initiatives

  - [**"Switching to Siit" Migration Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a sales enablement page, inspired by Hex's "Switching to Hex," to address migration pain points and build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [**Content Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
          - [**Why teams switch:** Sales insights from Gong recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
          - [**Migration process:** Details on Siit's POC and customer success support.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [**Action:** Matt will create a content brief; Carmel will provide sales recordings and foundational context files.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [**Competitor Comparison Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create dedicated pages for key competitors to support sales.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
      - [**Initial Competitors:** Fresh Service, Jira Service Management, ServiceNow, Serval, and Console.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will share battle cards and Figma drafts. Matt will adapt the copy for web.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)

### Content & Site Enhancements

  - [**App Access Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [**Performance:** Clicks and impressions quadrupled from January to February.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [**Impact:** 4–5 new sales opportunities created.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [**Content:** Emails include GrowthX-created guides ("Automation 101," "IAM automation...").](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [**Customer Testimonials:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Status:** Live on the site, hyperlinking to full customer stories.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Impact:** Improves social proof and trust, justifying a slight slowdown in publishing speed.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [**"Last Updated" Date:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Goal:** Add a "Last Updated" field to blog posts to signal content freshness without changing the original publish date.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will brief the developer on implementing this WordPress block.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Tool Page Widget Errors:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
      - [**Problem:** Widget errors are recurring due to missing review pages for some tools.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
      - [**Status:** GrowthX is actively fixing the errors this week.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
      - [**Future Focus:** Shift from individual tool reviews to high-value comparison pages, leveraging existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
      - [Analyze HubSpot data with Claude to link content to conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
      - [Brief developer on adding "Last Updated" date to blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [Share sales recordings and context files for the migration page.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [Share competitor battle cards and Figma drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Create content brief for the migration page.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for high-value comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Adapt competitor battle card copy for web.](https://fathom.video/share/2RGKno4gEz1FRmzHRzqguY8sKoxFqsWy?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
